data.title: Freedom Center to host conference on Austin Tice case in Washington on Aug. 14th with leaders in government, media, and academia.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, a full-day conference will take place in Washington to analyze the latest advancements in Austin's case over the past year. The event will include key figures from domestic and foreign government sectors, media, intelligence, and academia. The Tice family will also be in attendance. This conference aims to facilitate discussions and insights related to the case, with a focus on significant developments and evolving perspectives. The conference strives to provide a comprehensive overview of the current scenario, with discussions led by prominent individuals from various fields.

data.title: Jones Walker LLP expands into Minnesota by welcoming Kyle Brehm as state and local tax partner in Minneapolis.
data.description: Jones Walker LLP is excited to announce the appointment of Kyle Brehm as a partner in the Tax Practice Group and state and local tax team in Minneapolis, effective July 25, 2025. This addition enhances the firm's presence in the Minnesota region.

data.title: David Ellison faces significant challenges as he acquires Paramount with struggling cable and news divisions. AI threatens movie industry too.
data.description: The cable business of Paramount has sharply declined, while the news division is experiencing significant turmoil. Additionally, the threat of Artificial Intelligence impacting the film industry looms large. These are some of the key challenges David Ellison will navigate as he assumes control of the company.

data.title: Formula GT to launch global debut in Spring 2026, revolutionizing motorsports with hypercars and innovation. #HighSpeedRevolution
data.description: In Los Angeles on July 25, 2025, the world witnessed the unveiling of Formula GT, marking the beginning of a revolutionary chapter in motorsports. The global debut of Formula GT is scheduled for Spring 2026, promising to fuse advanced technology, immense power, and unparalleled speed using the top hypercars worldwide. This new venture is set to redefine racing excitement, attracting a wide audience with its blend of innovation and elite performance.

data.title: Donaldson Company (NYSE: DCI) declares $0.30 per share cash dividend payable on August 27, 2025. 29 years of consecutive dividend increases.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Donaldson Company, Inc. (NYSE: DCI) declared a standard cash dividend of 30.0 cents per share. This dividend will be distributed on August 27, 2025, to shareholders documented by August 12, 2025. Donaldson is part of the S&P High-Yield Dividend Aristocrats Index and has increased its annual dividend for 29 years, with the 2024 calendar year being the latest. The company has provided a cash dividend consistently every quarter for an impressive 69 years.
